name: Urth Dumein

sheet.name: Urth Dumein
sheet.background_story: Once a champion, feared and revered, until exile carved a change within him. His blade turned to mercy, his life to shadows. With a skill beyond mortal sight, he takes from the greedy, gifting to those left empty, his presence fading into dim light. In the forgotten corners, they whisper of a thief who brings justice where power has sown ruin—a specter, defiant, haunting the shadows claimed by darkened lords.

description: Once a champion, feared and revered, until exile carved a change within him. His blade turned to mercy, his life to shadows. With a skill beyond mortal sight, he takes from the greedy, gifting to those left empty, his presence fading into dim light. In the forgotten corners, they whisper of a thief who brings justice where power has sown ruin—a specter, defiant, haunting the shadows claimed by darkened lords.
